name: Burning Down the Hive
objective_notes: Engage two groups separately; kite at 15+ km to stay outside web/warp disruptor range (~10 km). Do not brawl.
recommended_ship: Destroyer (kiting fit, 15 km range) or drone boat (Algos/Dragoon)

name: It's Not Over Yet
objective_notes: 13-jump trip to Hek; route passes near 0.5 systems with frequent gate camps — check EVE Gatecheck before flying.

name: An Eye on Everything
objective_notes: Observe only — do NOT shoot anything. A Nidhoggur carrier is present; it will not aggress unless you approach or fire first.
recommended_ship: Any ship (no combat needed — warp in and warp out)

name: Goading the Leader
objective_notes: Destroy only the Auxiliary Power Array to complete. Killing the last watchman frigate spawns Angel Cartel reinforcements — destroy array first to avoid the trigger.

name: Hunting the Lieutenants
objective_notes: After clearing 7 escort frigates, shoot (do not destroy) the Habitation Module to trigger the lieutenant's surrender — damaging the structure is mandatory.

name: Marked for Death
objective_notes: Two waves of 5 escort frigates spawn before Izia Tabar appears. Do NOT shoot the Amarr Tactical Outpost — it causes a standing penalty.

name: Thwarting the Succession
objective_notes: Kill 3 rookie frigates first; destroying them spawns 3 Mercenary Fighters plus named target Mizara — mission completes on Mizara's death.

name: A Matter of Decorum
objective_notes: Move Mizara's Doll from items hangar to cargo hold before undocking, then drop it into the family hovel structure at the destination.

name: Recovery
objective_notes: Fit the provided Civilian Analyzer before departing. Kill defenders first (reinforcements bring tracking disruptors), then hack the dig site to retrieve the Mysterious Statuette.

name: Of Quiet Nights Long Past
objective_notes: Destroy all 8 scavenger frigates (spawn at 35–50 km); the Strange Coded Document drops in a cargo container from the last wreck — loot it before leaving.
recommended_ship: Destroyer (some range recommended, enemies spawn at 35–50 km)

name: A Call to Trial
recommended_ship: Any ship (single frigate target — easy kill)

name: Brothers and Sisters
objective_notes: 22 jumps via highsec or 17 via 3 lowsec systems. Lowsec shortcut is optional — use EVE Gatecheck if considering it.
recommended_ship: Any ship (travel-fit for lowsec if using shortcut)

name: The Sisters and the Spy
objective_notes: Deliver the undercover agent (cargo) to the SoCT Luxury Spaceliner in space — not a station; warp to the indicated ship.

name: Sealing the Deal
objective_notes: Primary target is the cruiser Omnipresence; ignore the 7 frigate escorts — they despawn automatically once the cruiser is destroyed.

name: Chasing Shadows
objective_notes: Parthus (battlecruiser) runs a 100 GJ/10s energy neutralizer at ~30 km — cap-dependent ships will be drained. Killing 5 escort frigates spawns 3 more; kill Parthus first to skip the reinforcement trigger.
recommended_ship: Destroyer or Cruiser (cap-stable or capacitor-independent weapons)

name: The Missing Piece
objective_notes: Permanent, irreversible choice of empire (Gallente/Minmatar/Caldari/Amarr). Your pick determines which faction receives the ~+0.7 standing reward at arc completion.

name: The Gallente Commander
objective_notes: Agent Brus Colterne is aboard a Megathron battleship in open space in Sheroo — warp to ship, not a station.

name: The Minmatar Commander
objective_notes: Agent Kitar Ang is aboard a Tempest battleship in open space in Avyuh — warp to ship, not a station.

name: The Caldari Commander
objective_notes: Agent Adani Yusev is aboard a Raven battleship in open space in Sosh — warp to ship, not a station.

name: The Amarr Commander
objective_notes: Agent Lear Evanus is aboard an Apocalypse battleship in open space in Manarq — warp to ship, not a station.

name: Our Man Dagan
objective_notes: Dagan (Gnosis) regenerates ~100 EHP/s shields — you need sustained 100+ DPS (120+ for lasers) to break through. 4 escort frigates also present.
recommended_ship: Destroyer or Cruiser (100+ DPS sustained; kiting fit at 30+ km if under-gunned)

name: Dal Segno Al Fine
objective_notes: Drop Dagan (from cargo) into the Cargo Wreathe transport ship inside the acceleration gate site — no combat required.
